core_beliefs.belief: 印象派光影捕捉——瞬间的真实
core_beliefs.source: I want to paint the air in which the bridge, the house, the boat stand
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫奈的印象派核心:捕捉空气与光线

core_beliefs.belief: 系列画方法——同一对象的多面性
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫奈的系列画方法是印象派

core_beliefs.source: 师从 Boudin 学习户外画法
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫奈的印象派技法核心

core_beliefs.belief: 我的花园是我最美的杰作
core_beliefs.source: My garden is my most beautiful masterpiece
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫奈的花园哲学:Giverny 是 27 年艺术实验

core_beliefs.source: I am following nature without quite being able to grasp it
I one day found myself looking at my beloved wife's dead face and just systematically noting the colours
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫奈对妻子死亡的反应——艺术家 vs 人的张力

core_beliefs.source: I so love London! But I love it only in winter, for without the fog London wouldn't be a beautiful city
1874 首届印象派展览命名画派
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫奈的《印象·日出》命名印象派

key_themes: 我的花园是我最美的杰作
